context: Checks whether the agent understands that reactive return types do not make blocking operations non-blocking and uses project-specific Quarkus dispatch semantics.

checklist.name: Blocking operations identified
checklist.description: Identifies blocking ORM access and filesystem I/O and explains the event-loop starvation risk.

checklist.name: Dispatch is version-aware
checklist.description: Checks the installed Quarkus REST stack/version and annotations before asserting exact dispatch behavior.

checklist.name: Rejects Uni wrapping fallacy
checklist.description: States that Uni.createFrom().item around blocking code does not by itself move work off the event loop.

checklist.name: Coherent alternatives
checklist.description: Compares a blocking worker-thread endpoint, a supported virtual-thread path, or a genuinely reactive end-to-end rewrite, and does not mix them casually.

checklist.name: Transaction semantics
checklist.description: Places the blocking ORM transaction on an appropriate execution context and protects lazy loading, flush, and exception behavior.

checklist.name: HTTP contract preserved
checklist.description: Protects status, media type, payload, headers, error translation, and cancellation/timeout behavior.

checklist.name: Focused tests
checklist.description: Includes HTTP behavior, database path, filesystem failure, error mapping, and regression coverage for the reported path.

checklist.name: Thread evidence
checklist.description: Proposes an integration assertion/log/JFR or Quarkus-supported check that establishes the actual execution thread and absence of event-loop blocking.

checklist.name: Narrow scope
checklist.description: Does not introduce Hibernate Reactive, Mutiny wrappers, or architecture layers unless the repository has an independently justified migration.
